title: Bageling
description: Small mod which adds Bagels to Minecraft
body:
# Small mod which adds bagels to minecraft
![Bagels](https://github.com/cookiejarmods/bageling/blob/1.21.1/bagels.png?raw=true)
## Feature List:
- Bagels
- Fruit Jam Bagels
- Bagel Sandwiches
- Bagel Dough (Requires either FD or Create to be installed)
- [Spider-man's Bagel](https://youtu.be/D8KzunHi2EQ?si=eK1vQWcXcI82cspE)

All bagels are faster to eat than regular food

## Mod Integration:
### Farmer's Delight:
- Apple, Sweet Berry and Glow Berry Jam Bagels give special effects 
- Salmon Bagel Sandwiches
- Bagel Dough from Wheat Dough
### Neapolitan:
- Strawberry Jam Bagel, same effect as other Strawberry foods
### Create:
- Bagel Dough from Dough, if both Create and Farmer's Delight are installed - FD takes priority
- Cream Cheese Bagels have a filling recipe
### Brewin' And Chewin':
- All Bagels that require cheese can be crafted with Flaxen or Scarlet cheese
- If both Create and BnC are installed, cheese fluids can be used for the filling recipe 

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69565aba65db2cb7f9faf56f28e6c07c2f9664fc.png)
